texto: Each of us, I think, adopts a comfortable and familiar era or place in which to plant ourselves; and from then on, that which disagrees with our memories -- a new building here, a change in paint there -- is forever jarring and anachronistic.
explicacao: Citação de Daniel D. Victor sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Each of us, I think, adopts a comfortable and familiar era or place in which to plant ourselves; …” articula reflexao, memory, time em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e time.
